Issue: Validate downloaded file integrity and raise ValueError on hash mismatch
Decision: Add hash validation check to downloaded files in monai/apps/utils.py
Rationale: To prevent corruption or tampering of downloaded files by verifying their hash against expected values
Author: e-mny
Description: The downloaded file validation mechanism in monai/apps/utils.py
Cost: Low (simple change with minimal resource impact)
Risk: Low (validating file integrity is a standard practice with minimal risk)
Justification: The decision relates to file integrity validation (hash check) in a utility module, which is unrelated to ML lifecycle stages. Keyword 'monai/apps/utils.py' indicates a general-purpose helper function rather than an ML-specific artifact.
